clinics.address: KL Sentral (exact unit TBC)

content.services_summary: Klinik Berkat at KL Sentral is a dedicated travel health clinic registered with the CDC as a Global Travel Clinic since January 2010. The clinic's doctors are trained in travel medicine and actively monitor CDC, WHO, and ISTM recommendations to provide up-to-date destination-specific advice. It is a fully MOH-licensed yellow fever vaccination centre issuing ICVP certificates. Patient reviews highlight comprehensive A-to-Z travel health guidance, short wait times, and a genuinely travel-medicine-focused team â€” rare in Malaysia.
content.consult_note: Dedicated travel medicine consultation â€” covers full pre-travel risk assessment
content.highlight: CDC-registered travel clinic since 2010, MOH yellow fever licensed

clinics.address: Taman Century / Skudai (multiple branches)

content.services_summary: BP Healthcare Johor Bahru appears to be a general healthcare facility. Specific travel medicine and vaccination service details are not provided on their available website content.
content.highlight: General healthcare facility in Johor Bahru

clinics.address: Lot 2, Jalan Pendaftar U1/54, Seksyen U1, Temasya@Glenmarie, 40150 Shah Alam

content.services_summary: BP Healthcare offers comprehensive travel vaccination services including pre-travel health consultations, country-specific vaccine recommendations, and post-travel illness screening. Services include vaccines for travel-related diseases, malaria and altitude sickness prophylaxis, and treatment for travel-related infections. Consultations recommended 4-6 weeks before departure to allow vaccines to take effect.
certifications: Recognized as top contributor to national vaccination effort
content.consult_note: Pre-travel consultation included with vaccination services; doctors tailor advice based on destination, activities, and individual health records.
content.highlight: Yellow fever licensed travel vaccination centre nationwide

clinics.address: No. 79, Jalan SS 23/15, Taman SEA, 47400 Petaling Jaya

content.services_summary: BP Healthcare offers comprehensive travel vaccination services including pre-travel health evaluations, tailored vaccine recommendations based on destination, and post-travel illness screening. Services cover routine travel vaccines, malaria prophylaxis, altitude sickness prevention, and treatment for travel-related infections. Pre-travel consultations are available to assess individual health conditions and current medications.
content.consult_note: Pre-travel consultation with doctors recommended before vaccination appointment. Patients advised to bring vaccination records, health conditions history, and current medications for tailored advice.
content.highlight: Yellow fever centre with comprehensive travel health services

clinics.address: Jalan Toman 1, Kemayan Square, 70200 Seremban

vaccines.notes: YF vaccination promotion listed on website. Verify price.

content.services_summary: Columbia Asia Hospital Seremban is a modern multi-disciplinary private hospital in the Oakland Commercial Centre, Seremban, Negeri Sembilan. The hospital offers yellow fever vaccination as part of their travel health services, making it one of the accessible yellow fever vaccination points in Negeri Sembilan for travellers heading to endemic regions. As part of the Columbia Asia group, the hospital also served as a MOH-designated COVID-19 vaccination centre.
content.consult_note: Contact hospital for current vaccination packages
content.highlight: Yellow fever vaccination available, Seremban

clinics.address: Persiaran Southkey 1, Kota Southkey, 80150 Johor Bahru

content.services_summary: Columbia Asia Hospital Tebrau is the largest Columbia Asia hospital in Malaysia with 205 beds, situated in the modern Kota Southkey development in Johor Bahru. The hospital provides specialist medical care across multiple disciplines and served as a Ministry of Health-designated COVID-19 vaccination centre. Vaccination services including travel-relevant vaccines are available through their outpatient clinics â€” contact the hospital directly to confirm current travel vaccine menu.
content.consult_note: Contact hospital to confirm travel vaccine availability
content.highlight: 205-bed private hospital, Kota Southkey JB

The clinic offers typhoid and Menactra (meningococcal) vaccines. Note: no confirmed Johor Bahru branch has been identified â€” contact the clinic directly to verify JB location and vaccine availability.

content.services_summary: Dr Prevents is Malaysia's dedicated travel medicine clinic brand, operating 24 hours across 8 branches in KL and Selangor. The KL flagship clinic offers a full travel vaccination menu including yellow fever, dengue (Qdenga), typhoid, Japanese encephalitis, hepatitis A/B, meningococcal, rabies, and anti-malarial prophylaxis. Pre-travel consultations are a core service, not an add-on. The 24/7 availability makes Dr Prevents the most accessible dedicated travel clinic in Malaysia.
content.consult_note: Pre-travel consultation included; walk-in 24 hours
content.highlight: Malaysia's dedicated 24/7 travel medicine clinic chain

vaccines.notes: High rabies risk in Sabah — key vaccine. Verify price.

content.services_summary: Gleneagles Hospital Kota Kinabalu is Sabah's first international tertiary care hospital, MSQH-accredited, with an Infectious Diseases specialty department. While no dedicated travel clinic has been identified, the infectious disease team can provide travel health consultations and vaccinations. As the premier private hospital in KK, it is the most credentialed option for travellers needing specialist-level travel medicine in Sabah.
content.consult_note: Contact hospital to confirm travel vaccine availability
content.highlight: Sabah's top private hospital, infectious disease dept

clinics.address: 286 & 288, Jalan Ampang

content.services_summary: Gleneagles Hospital Kuala Lumpur is a JCI-accredited tertiary hospital with a dedicated Infectious Diseases department, staffed by specialists holding the Diploma in Tropical Medicine & Hygiene (DTM&H, Liverpool). Yellow fever vaccination (Stamaril) is available via the Health Screening Centre at approximately RM450 including consultation. While not a standalone travel clinic, the infectious disease expertise makes it a trusted option for travellers needing specialist-level advice alongside vaccination.
content.consult_note: Book via WhatsApp +60 16-339 3000; YF ~RM450 incl. consultation
content.highlight: JCI-accredited hospital, yellow fever & infectious disease specialists

The clinic provides group vaccination services for families and corporate clients, along with pre-travel health screening and vaccination consultations. Its multilingual capability makes it particularly well-suited to Japanese expatriates and international travellers based in Penang.

No dedicated travel clinic, travel medicine specialist, or yellow fever vaccination centre has been identified.

content.services_summary: Klinik Kesihatan Bukit Indah is a Malaysian Ministry of Health government health clinic in Taman Bukit Indah, Johor Bahru. The clinic provides subsidised vaccinations under the national immunisation programme, covering hepatitis B, MMR, tetanus, pneumococcal, and influenza for eligible residents. It is a cost-effective first point of contact for residents seeking routine travel vaccinations.
content.consult_note: Subsidised fees for Malaysian citizens
content.highlight: Government health clinic, Bukit Indah JB

content.services_summary: Klinik Kesihatan Gelang Patah is a Malaysian Ministry of Health government health clinic on Jalan Besar Gelang Patah, serving the southwestern Johor Bahru area near the Second Link. The clinic provides subsidised national immunisation programme vaccines including hepatitis B, tetanus, MMR, and influenza. It is an accessible and affordable option for residents in Gelang Patah seeking routine or pre-travel vaccinations.
content.consult_note: Subsidised fees for Malaysian citizens
content.highlight: Government health clinic, Gelang Patah JB

It delivers subsidised primary healthcare and national immunisation programme vaccines to citizens and residents, including hepatitis B, influenza, and tetanus. Government-subsidised fees make it one of the most affordable vaccination options in the Larkin catchment.
content.consult_note: Subsidised fees for Malaysian citizens
content.highlight: Government health clinic, Larkin JB

It provides subsidised vaccination services under the national immunisation programme for citizens and residents, including hepatitis B, MMR, tetanus, and influenza. Vaccination services follow the national immunisation schedule and include influenza, hepatitis B, MMR, and tetanus at subsidised rates. The clinic has been earmarked for facility upgrades as part of Johor's expanded public health investment.

Part of the Klinik Caring network, it serves the Skudai community with affordable and accessible primary care.

content.services_summary: Klinik Uzma offers comprehensive travel medicine services including yellow fever vaccination (Stamaril), pre-travel consultations, advice on disease prevention, insect bite avoidance, DVT risk reduction, motion sickness medication, and altitude sickness guidance. As an approved private yellow fever vaccination centre, they provide personalised vaccination recommendations based on travel destination and medical history.
certifications: Approved private yellow fever vaccination centre (Malaysia)
content.consult_note: Consultation fee included in yellow fever vaccination price (RM 560). Pre-travel consultations recommended 6-8 weeks before departure.

content.highlight: Comprehensive vaccine range, Bukit OUG KL

content.services_summary: Klinik HealthQuarters Desa Petaling is a 4.9-star family and preventive health clinic offering a strong vaccination range including typhoid, hepatitis A/B, dengue, rabies, meningococcal, and pneumococcal vaccines. While focused on family and preventive care rather than travel medicine, the comprehensive vaccine menu makes it a practical option for travellers needing standard travel jabs. content.services_summary: KPJ Seremban Specialist Hospital hosts an Immunise4Life-operated travel vaccination clinic (Suite 407, Kemayan Square), making it one of the most accessible dedicated travel vaccination services in Negeri Sembilan. The Immunise4Life clinic within KPJ Seremban offers yellow fever ICVP, typhoid, hepatitis, and other travel vaccines alongside professional pre-travel consultations. The combination of a specialist hospital setting with a dedicated travel vaccine operator provides a higher standard of care than general GP clinics.

vaccines.notes: Airport location — convenient for last-minute. Verify price.

content.services_summary: Menara Medical Clinic at Penang International Airport (Level 1) is a Ministry of Health-approved yellow fever vaccination centre, one of very few in Penang where travellers can obtain the official ICVP (yellow card) certificate. Part of the Menara Clinic group operating since 2007, the airport location serves departing and arriving passengers with vaccination, health screening, ultrasound, and minor procedures. The MOH yellow fever approval is its key differentiator.
content.consult_note: Walk-in available at airport; confirm hours before travel
content.highlight: MOH-licensed yellow fever centre at Penang Airport

Those seeking complex travel medicine advice â€” such as post-exposure rabies management or tropical fever work-up â€” can access specialist ID consultation.

content.services_summary: The Port Health Office Kuching is a Malaysian Ministry of Health government facility authorised to administer yellow fever vaccinations and issue the International Certificate of Vaccination and Prophylaxis (ICVP/yellow card) under International Health Regulations. It is a key vaccination point for travellers departing from Kuching and Sarawak to yellow fever-endemic regions in Africa and South America. As a government office, fees are subsidised for Malaysian citizens.
certifications: IHR Port Health â€” Kementerian Kesihatan Malaysia
content.consult_note: Government facility â€” subsidised fees for citizens

content.services_summary: Regency Specialist Hospital in Masai is an MSQH and Malaysian Healthcare Travel Council (MHTC)-accredited 218-bed private hospital founded in 2009, located approximately 15 minutes from the Singapore Woodlands checkpoint. The hospital offers dengue (Dengvaxia/Qdenga) and influenza vaccinations and serves over 200,000 patients annually. Vaccination services focus on endemic disease prevention rather than travel medicine, and no yellow fever centre designation has been identified.
content.consult_note: Contact hospital to confirm travel vaccine availability

The hospital provides a comprehensive range of healthcare services including outpatient and specialist care across all major disciplines. Vaccination services are available through their outpatient departments, serving both locals and travellers requiring immunisation in Kuching.
certifications: MOH Malaysia â€” Government Tertiary Hospital
content.consult_note: Subsidised fees for Malaysian citizens
content.highlight: Largest referral hospital in Sarawak, Kuching

The clinic offers standard vaccination services including typhoid, hepatitis, dengue, and influenza. Not positioned as a travel medicine specialist, but accessible for routine travel vaccines in the PJ area.

clinics.address: The Peak Suites, Signal Hill, Kota Kinabalu

content.services_summary: Signal Hill Clinic is a general neighbourhood family practice in Kota Kinabalu, established in 2018. The clinic offers walk-in services for general health, wound care, and basic vaccinations including influenza. It is not a travel medicine specialist and does not offer yellow fever vaccination. Suitable for minor health needs and routine vaccinations in the Signal Hill area.
content.highlight: General family clinic, walk-in, Signal Hill KK

content.services_summary: Sunway Medical Centre offers yellow fever vaccination services as an approved yellow fever vaccinating centre in Malaysia. They provide pre-travel health advice and yellow fever immunization for travellers to South America and Africa, with single-dose vaccination providing lifetime immunity and valid certificates.
certifications: Approved yellow fever vaccinating centre in Malaysia
content.consult_note: Appointment recommended 6-8 weeks prior to departure; vaccination should be given at least 10 days before entry to countries with legal requirements.

content.services_summary: Twin Towers Medical Clinic KLCC offers comprehensive travel medicine vaccinations including anti-malaria tablets, yellow fever, hepatitis A/B, Japanese encephalitis, meningitis, rabies, typhoid, and other routine immunizations. Their specialty focuses on preventing health problems in foreign environments through an extensive range of travel-specific vaccinations and procedures.
content.highlight: Wide-range travel vaccinations including yellow fever

clinics.address: Lot 28, Lorong Universiti, Lembah Pantai, 50603 Kuala Lumpur

content.services_summary: UM Specialist Centre (UMSC) is a leading academic specialist hospital established in 1998, affiliated with Universiti Malaya. Its dedicated Travel Medicine specialty â€” run through the Infectious Diseases division â€” offers comprehensive pre-travel consultations, vaccinations, pre-exposure prophylaxis, and altitude sickness medication for international travellers. Post-travel care including fever evaluation in returning travellers is also available. With 270+ consultants across 40 specialties, UMSC provides specialist-level travel medicine advice beyond what general clinics offer.
content.consult_note: Appointment required â€” specialist travel medicine consultation
content.highlight: Dedicated travel medicine specialty, academic hospital KL

clinics.address: Sublot 23, Unisquare Commercial Centre, 94300 Kota Samarahan

vaccines.notes: Confirmed YF vaccination centre. Verify price.

content.services_summary: UNI Clinic offers travel medicine services including yellow fever vaccination (RM450/dose) with WHO-compliant guidance on timing and mandatory destinations. They are MOH-approved as a Yellow Vaccine Center and provide the yellow booklet free of charge. Services also include pre-travel health screening and general immunizations.
certifications: MOH (Ministry of Health) Yellow Vaccine Center approval
content.highlight: MOH-licensed yellow fever vaccination centre, Kuching

clinics.address: Address TBC

content.services_summary: WeCare Clinic at Ukay Boulevard, Kuala Lumpur, offers travel health assessments and personalised pre-travel vaccination plans alongside general GP services. Vaccines available include Japanese encephalitis, typhoid, hepatitis, and yellow fever. While not a certified travel medicine specialist clinic, WeCare provides a practical vaccination service with same-day appointments for travellers who need common travel jabs.
content.consult_note: Pre-travel assessment available â€” confirm yellow fever availability before visiting
content.highlight: Pre-travel vaccination assessments, Ukay Boulevard KL
